title: eriophyllum caespitosum var. leucophyllum
intro: Eriophyllum caespitosum var. leucophyllum, also known as Woolly Sunflower or White Woolly Sunflower, is a perennial herb that belongs to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can aid in wound healing and reducing pain and inflammation. Eriophyllum caespitosum var. leucophyllum is also known for its health benefits, including its ability to lower blood sugar levels and reduce fever. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or salves, which can be used to treat various health issues, such as skin conditions and digestive problems.
